title: Kim Godfrey
compiled_truth: Kim Godfrey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-07 to 2001-10-19), Kim Godfrey sent 8 and received 20 emails, totalling 28 interactions. Top correspondents: [Bob Jordan](people/bob-jordan-compaq) (3), [David Spurlin](people/david-spurlin-compaq) (3), [Jim Crowder](people/jim-crowder) (3), [Gil Melman](people/gil-melman) (3), [Jennifer Medcalf](people/jennifer-medcalf) (3).
